Withdrawals

The following players were originally selected but withdrew due to injury or other reasons:

  • Spain: Dani Carvajal withdrew due to injury and was replaced by Álvaro Odriozola.
  • Germany: Manuel Neuer was originally selected but Bernd Leno was called instead. (this entry should not be parsed as a withdrawal)
  • France: Laurent Koscielny withdrew due to injury.
